description: Italian criminal organization based in Veneto, founded in the late 1970s by Felice Maniero. It engaged in kidnappings, robberies, drug and arms trafficking, money laundering, and murders. The group was heavily hit in the 1990s after Maniero's arrest and collaboration with authorities.

country_links.evidence_quote: Il 31 dicembre 2018 è stato arrestato in Croazia , mentre usciva dalla sua abitazione nella capitale croata, l'ex affiliato Claudio D'Este
country_links.context: An ex-affiliate of the organization was arrested in Croatia while leaving his home in the capital.

country_links.evidence_quote: traffico di cocaina proveniente dal Sud America , attraverso la Spagna e destinata a Venezia
country_links.context: The organization trafficked cocaine from South America through Spain to Venice.

country_links.evidence_quote: viene arrestato dopo cinque anni di latitanza Francesco Tonicello, vecchio boss della Mala del Brenta, mentre faceva l'edicolante alla fermata della metropolitana Vauxhall di Londra
country_links.context: The organization had a boss arrested while working as a newsagent at a London Underground station.
